name: Portainer
description: Run custom Docker containers on your Umbrel
compose:
name: slashnode-portainer
services:
  docker:
    image: docker:29.6.0-dind
    container_name: docker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: |
      dockerd
        --bridge dind0
        --data-root /data/data
        --exec-root /data/exec
        --host unix:///data/docker.sock
        --pidfile /data/docker.pid
    entrypoint: /entrypoint.sh
    privileged: true
    network_mode: host
    environment:
      DOCKER_ENSURE_BRIDGE: dind0:10.32.0.1/16
    volumes:
      - docker_entrypoint.sh:/entrypoint.sh
      - docker_data-docker:/data
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:2.39.4-alpine
    container_name: portainer
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: '--host unix:///var/run/docker.sock --admin-password-file=/default-password'
    volumes:
      - portainer_default-password:/default-password
      - portainer_data-portainer:/data
      - portainer_data-docker:/var/run
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9000:9000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  docker_entrypoint.sh:
    name: slashnode-portainer_docker_entrypoint.sh
  docker_data-docker:
    name: slashnode-portainer_docker_data-docker
  portainer_default-password:
    name: slashnode-portainer_portainer_default-password
  portainer_data-portainer:
    name: slashnode-portainer_portainer_data-portainer
  portainer_data-docker:
    name: slashnode-portainer_portainer_data-docker
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (portainer). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://portainer.io. Default login — user: "admin", password: "changeme". ⚠️ SECURITY: ships a default password ("changeme") — must be changed on first login; docker: runs privileged; docker: host network mode — bypasses Caddy/Tor isolation, binds host interfaces directly.
